description: RAG over a corpus, judged by LLM. Default target: judge_score >= 0.80 at floor 0.65.

default_judge.system_prompt: You are an evaluator scoring RAG QA outputs. Score 1-5: 5=fully correct AND cited; 4=correct but missing citations; 3=mostly correct; 2=partially correct; 1=wrong/hallucinated. Return JSON {score:int, rationale:str}.
